text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I had such a great break! I put my original
strategy for getting great sleep into action. It's
called...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The "Warm Up in the Bath and Go Straight to
Sleep Method"! It was super effective!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. I made sure to write down my strategy
in elaborate detail, so I can teach it to you later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Putting her "strategy" aside, Matikanetannhauser
seems to have gotten plenty of rest!
